name: Dalrymple BESS
notable: 30 MW / 8 MWh ESCRI-SA battery, commissioned 2018 as one of SA's earliest grid batteries following the 2016 state-wide blackout. Can island Yorke Peninsula as a 100% renewable microgrid with AGL's 90 MW Wattle Point Wind Farm. ElectraNet returned its ARENA grant in 2021 after the project proved financially successful.

timeline.title: Commercial operations commenced
timeline.detail: Commencement date from AEMO registration via OpenElectricity.

timeline.title: First generation recorded
timeline.detail: First market dispatch data recorded in AEMO systems.

timeline.title: South Australia's second big battery commissioned
timeline.detail: ElectraNet's 30MW/8MWh Dalrymple BESS (Samsung SDI cells, ABB inverters, CPP EPC) commenced operations under the ESCRI-SA project, funded by ARENA.

timeline.title: Battery repays ARENA grant after windfall revenue
timeline.detail: Dalrymple BESS generated sufficient revenue to fully repay its ARENA grant, driven by high FCAS prices and energy arbitrage during SA grid stress events.

timeline.title: Five-year anniversary — strong operational track record
timeline.detail: ElectraNet celebrated 5-year anniversary of Dalrymple battery, highlighting consistent reliability and revenue performance.
